name: LibraryForge
description: Generate movie libraries as before, while restricting series generation to explicit Dispatcharr Series IDs.
author: Nicholas Boulanger / shedunraid

fields.label: Root Folder for Movies
fields.help_text: Path where movie folders will be created

fields.label: Root Folder for Series
fields.help_text: Path where series folders will be created

fields.label: Dispatcharr URL (IMPORTANT!)
fields.help_text: Must be accessible from your media server; this URL is written into .strm files.

fields.label: Batch Size (Movies)
fields.help_text: Number of movies to process in this run

fields.label: Batch Size (Series)
fields.help_text: Unique whitelisted series to refresh and process in this run

fields.label: Series Whitelist (Dispatcharr IDs)
fields.help_text: Comma-separated Dispatcharr Series database IDs. Only these series are eligible; leave blank to process no series.

fields.label: Generate Series NFO Files
fields.help_text: Create .nfo metadata files for series and episodes

actions.label: Scan for VODs to Convert
actions.description: Show total movies and series available in Dispatcharr

actions.label: Generate Movie .strm Files
actions.description: Process movies according to batch size

actions.label: Generate Series .strm Files
actions.description: Generate episodes only for series in the whitelist

actions.label: Clean Up Movies
actions.description: Remove all movie folders and .strm files

actions.label: Clean Up Whitelisted Series
actions.description: Remove folders only for series currently in the whitelist
